jobs.desc: This is Adyen Adyen is looking for a data-driven, proactive and collaborative demand generation manager who has extensive experience in account based marketing (ABM). The demand generation role is focused on driving impact for Adyen’s acquisition efforts of new customers through marketing. In this role, you’ll be responsible for planning, setting up and optimizing targeted account based marketing campaigns across owned and paid channels. The ideal candidate is experienced in meeting revenue-based goals through 1:Few, and 1:1 account based marketing campaigns and collaborating with SDRs and Sales. This is a matrixed role collaborating across the UK/I and Global Marketing teams to generate sales accepted opportunities. What you’ll do: Plan, set-up and optimize 1:few and 1:1 account based marketing campaigns Identify target accounts together with with SDR and Sales and build and segment lists based on market priorities Map, plan and create compelling messages and creative against the prioritized accounts Collaborate closely with the digital marketing manager to create effective media strategies

jobs.title: Senior Manager, Sales Strategy & Planning, Retail & Foodservice

reasons: No sponsorship information in the posting

jobs.desc: Senior Manager, Sales Strategy & Planning, Retail and Food Service Factor is building the next growth platform in fresh prepared meals. We’ve already built one of the leading DTC meal brands in North America, and now we’re extending that strength into retail and foodservice, where customers are increasingly looking for better, fresher, more convenient meals. We believe this is a category ready for real disruption, and early signals show that Factor’s product, brand, and customer promise are resonating. We are hiring a Sr. Manager, Sales Strategy & Planning, Retail & Foodservice to build the commercial operating system that turns this ambition into a scalable business. Reporting to the Director, Commercial Sales, Retail & Foodservice, you will own commercial forecasting and sales planning, trade and revenue growth management, pricing architecture, commercial reporting, and new item launch processes - much of which doesn't exist yet and is yours to build. This is a high-impact role for someone analytical, structured, commercially curious, and energized by building systems where none exist. You'll be the connective tissue across sales, supply chain, finance, marketing, and operations.
